title: base_url is validated at construction time via url::Url::parse
description: JmapChatClient::new validates base_url by calling url::Url::parse and also checks that no path component is present. This means invalid base_urls fail immediately at construction with a clear InvalidArgument error rather than silently producing malformed request URLs at first use. A contributor might suggest deferring validation ('constructors should not fail'), returning a builder or making new infallible by accepting a pre-parsed Url. Deferring would push the error into async code mid-session, making it harder to attribute. The construction-time validation also rejects subtle bugs like 'https://host/api' which would double the path on every request.
close_reason: Decision record: current implementation is correct; no code change needed
